columns.extraction_plan: The number of deaths in the treatment arm (ADT plus D) is reported in the "Overall survival" section of the main text. Extract the numerical value corresponding to "ADT plus D arm" from the sentence: "After a median follow-up of 83.9 mo (95% CI, 82.9-84.7), 242 patients had died (127 in the ADT arm and 115 in the ADT plus D arm; 147 and 95 in the HVD and LVD subgroups, respectively)."

The number of deaths in the control arm (ADT arm) is reported in the "Overall survival" section of the main text. Extract the numerical value corresponding to "ADT arm" from the sentence: "After a median follow-up of 83.9 mo (95% CI, 82.9-84.7), 242 patients had died (127 in the ADT arm and 115 in the ADT plus D arm; 147 and 95 in the HVD and LVD subgroups, respectively)."
